raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, an ideal autotransformer is connected to a sinusoidal alternating current at the input. Both meters are ideal AC meters. Which of the following statements is correct?
raw_answer_text: When switch \( S \) is closed, sliding the tap downward decreases the input power

choice_map.A: The pilot light \( L \) remains lit, and the direction of the current through the light changes 50 times per second
choice_map.B: Regardless of the position of switch \( S \), the voltmeter reading remains constant
choice_map.C: When switch \( S \) is closed, sliding the tap downward decreases the input power
choice_map.D: When switch \( S \) is closed, sliding the tap downward does not change the voltmeter reading
